column1: ## Full 15×15 Matrix (Raw Data from Baseball Almanac)

The complete H2H numeric matrix is best obtained directly from Baseball Almanac's interactive table at https://www.baseball-almanac.com/teams/teamvsteam-nl.shtml. This file provides the verified key matchup summary data instead.
- data/nl_team_vs_team_summary.csv (12 key matchups with verified numbers)
- data/nl_h2h_rivalries_detailed.csv (20 detailed rivalries with era analysis)
